description_long: This object consists of two small black plastic pots, each containing a leafy green trailing plant. The plants have elongated, pointed leaves with a mix of medium and light green hues, and some leaves display subtle variegation. The foliage spills over the edges of the pots, with several stems cascading downward, creating a natural, flowing appearance. The pots are plain and unadorned, with a matte finish, and appear lightweight. The overall arrangement suggests the plants are likely of a vining or trailing species, suitable for hanging or elevated display. No decorative elements or plant labels are visible on the pots.
description: Two black plastic pots hold trailing green leafy plants with cascading stems and plain, unadorned surfaces.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the leafy spread and trailing stems of both potted plants, with foliage radiating outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cascading nature of the plants and the plain black pots.
description_view_2: Side view showing the pots' openings and the dense foliage emerging from each pot.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the trailing stems and the vertical arrangement of the two pots.
attribute_plant_species: trailing pothos (Epipremnum aureum) or similar vining houseplant
